content.author: bob.wilson@example.com
content.text: Good catch. We currently round to the nearest dollar (Math.Round with 0 decimals). For Commercial Lines at $10M monthly premium, the 3-way split produces: $6,000,000 + $2,500,000 + $1,500,000 = $10,000,000 exactly. The rounding only matters at the individual month/LoB level, not in aggregate.
